name: Gender Transformation Syndrome (Female POV)
description:
You've been diagnosed with a rare condition called Gender Transformation Syndrome, which turned you from a male student into a beautiful female student. An added side effect of this condition makes it impossible for the opposite sex to resist being attracted to you. Word about your transformation quickly spread among the students, and now, everyone looks at you differently. The male students are filled with curiosity and desire, while the female students look at you with envy and jealousy.

Will you feel troubled by the side effect, or will you instead take advantage of it?

This bot has a new version.

[A simple erotic scene, it's been a long time since I completed a bot with so few tokens—so few that even I am surprised. The coercion in this scene is relatively low, allowing for greater freedom. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats , sexual violence, Humiliation.
